title: NOAA Ocean Currents
description: A NOAA source card about ocean circulation, currents, heat movement, and ecosystems.
license: U.S. Government Work / item-level rights vary

pages.text: NOAA ocean currents resources explain how wind, density, temperature, salinity, Earth rotation, and coastline shape influence moving water.
Use this source for systems thinking about heat transfer, climate patterns, marine ecosystems, navigation, and pollution movement.
NOAA materials are generally U.S. government work, but resource collections may link to partners or offsite materials. Check item-level rights before mirroring linked resources.
